mechanics.excerpt: Fired by rumors that House Liao was attempting open new BattleMech facility; Your estranged parents and negotiated deal you made Up with to trade in metals produced by Zettle Metals Incorporated: Armed with that valuable commodity; you ventured into the Confederation and landed the deal of the decade signing contract for exclusive trade of your commodities with Shengli Arms on Victoria: Wealthy; well-connected and always looking for better deal, you have confidence in your ability to talk yourself out of any situation and you usually end up making money while you 're atit.
